oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Ask the Vet?
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: DVM, Stephen Fronefield,
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 50 Number 1 (October/November 2023).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.By Stephen Fronefield, DVM, DABVP - Avian ABC Animal and Bird Clinic, Sugarland, TX Got a Question? Send your question for the vet to watchbird@afabirds.org.By submitting a question, you acknowledge that: AFA cannot guarantee that every question will be answered; even if your question is answered, no veterinarian -client relationship is established; and no specific medical condition can be addressed without a physical examination and evaluation of your bird.This column is NOT a substitute for veterinary care. When should I take my bird to the vet? Before I answer that question, let me first help with an answer to this question: How do I find an avian veterinarian?Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 50 No. 4 (2023): Watchbird October/November 2023; 10
